texto: I dabbled a little bit in acting in high school, and then I forgot about it completely. And then at about 25 I went to a class. I don't think anybody in my family thought it was an intelligent choice. I don't think anybody thought I'd succeed, which is understandable. I think they were just happy that I was doing something.
explicacao: Citação de James Gandolfini sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I dabbled a little bit in acting in high school, and then I forgot about it completely. And then …” articula reflexao, happy, school em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como school e choice.
